{{Quote|I am most comfortable in my preferred role as a gentleman's personal gentlething, but if you would prefer a wordless bodyguard, or even a discreet assassin who simply haunts your travels, I am fully equipped to fill those roles.|Fidelis|<ref name="Yoda: Dark Rendezvous">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
'''Fidelis''' was a [[Tac-Spec Corporation|Tac-Spec]] [[FIII Footman droid]] owned by [[House Malreaux]]. He was painted in crimson and ivory: his chassis and head were decorated in the checkerboard pattern that was the livery of House Malreaux, while his extremities bore an ivory base coat with crimson piping.

==History==
The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was part of the staff at [[Château Malreaux]] for twelve generations until [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] when he was sent by [[Whirry Malreaux]] to watch—from a distance—her son [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie]], who had been taken in by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] with the consent of her [[Alcohol/Legends|drunken]] self. A [[20 BBY/Legends|decade later]], when Whie finally left the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on a mission to Vjun, Fidelis and his master-less counterpart [[Solis]] tracked down and met up with Whie and his team, which included [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], aboard the ''[[Reasonable Doubt]]''. He protected Whie during the journey and led them to Château Malreaux. However, he unknowingly led Whie and his friend [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Scout]] in through a cellar where they were caught by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. Asajj threatened to kill Whie if Fidelis did not commit [[Death/Legends|suicide]] with a [[Neural-Net eraser]]. He sadly accepted, even though Whie and Tallisibeth told him not to, as he thought it would be the most loyal thing for the Malreaux family. His last words were, "Only remember, I served the House Malreaux. I didn't think it would end like this."
